title: Aptamers at work – effective neutralization of SARS-CoV-2 and identifying protein biomarkers in biofluids using highly parallelized RNA aptamer screens.
author: Kjems, Jørgen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Jørgens kjems presented the APTASHAPE platform at the Gorden Research Conference on RNA Nanotechnology, Ventura CA, USA, January 2023.  

 The oDIN oLIVER project (https://projects.au.dk/odin/oliver) was presented, and the audience showed great interest in the APTASHAPE technology and the unmet need for early detection of liver diseases (NAFLD).  

 During 2022 Jørgen Kjems presented the work at several meetings and international conferences:  

 ”Fremtidens Medicin” 
Århundredets Festival 
3. Marts 2022 
Doc1 Aarhus 

 RNA therapeutics and diagnostics 
Molekylærbiologi og genetiks studenterråd (MoGenS) 
4. Maj 2022 

 The Medicine of the Future 
21. June 2022 
Klifo, Copenhagen 

 RNA based therapeutics and diagnostics 
EI Nano Conference Chalmers Uiversity 
Göteburg Sweden 

 RNA at work – in diagnosis and therapy 
4th NCCR RNA & Disease Summer School on RNA & Entrepreneurship 
Suss Switzerland 

 Identifying protein biomarkers in biofluids using highly parallelised RNA aptamer screens 
Next Gen Omics Conference 2022 London,UK 
9-10 Nov 2022 

 Contact information:
